name: GhostNPC Wandering Trainers
author: t-Ghost-t
description: Wandering Trainers populates the overworld with life by adding wandering NPCs and their companion Pokémon.
- Randomly spawning trainers with their own follower Pokémon on every route.
- Low spawn rates so wandering trainers don't overwhelm the world.
- Fair battle encounters that strictly forbid over-powered Legendaries.
